title: Fingrid Open Data — Finnish power system & electricity market
description: Open data from Fingrid, Finland's transmission system operator, covering the power system and electricity market: production, consumption, wind power, transmission capacities, balancing (e.g. aFRR) and more. Includes both measured and forecast series, many updated in near real-time. Directly relevant to the Nordic synchronous area. EDiT links only; Fingrid hosts and publishes the data.
spatialCoverage: Finland (FI); cross-border capacities to SE1/SE3/EE etc.

distribution.note: Free REST API; registration needs only a valid email, after which you approve the licence and receive an API key (passed in the x-api-key header). Query by dataset ID and time range, choosing JSON/CSV/XML output. Licence is CC BY 4.0 for datasets produced by Fingrid (attribute as 'Source Fingrid / data.fingrid.fi, license CC 4.0 BY'); a few datasets from other organisations may carry a different licence stated with the dataset. API docs: https://data.fingrid.fi/en/instructions and the developer portal https://developer-data.fingrid.fi .

variables: Many individual time series, each identified by a numeric dataset ID (e.g. production, consumption, wind power, day-ahead transmission capacities), typically hourly, in MW, timestamped in UTC. Full dataset list and per-series field definitions maintained upstream by Fingrid.
